series_metadata.series_description: Annual reports from the consulting firms hired as consultants by the Ohio Bureau of Workers’ Compensation Board of Directors. This report is a PDF file that is sent from the consulting firms and uploaded to Actuarial Unit’s SharePoint site.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the Actuarial Unit for 25 years, and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain the Portable Document Format (PDF) file of annual reports permanent., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
